title: Station 7
description: The protagonist wakes up in a damaged space station with failing life support. Tests resource management, inventory tracking, time pressure, and environmental state changes.
setting: An orbiting research station that has suffered catastrophic damage. Emergency lighting only. Oxygen is leaking. The protagonist is the only conscious crew member.

protagonist.name: Ren
protagonist.description: A junior systems engineer, late 20s, practical and resourceful. Woke up on the floor of the crew quarters with a head wound.

turns.user_input: Get up slowly. Assess my injuries and look around
Check my tablet. Does it still work? What's the station status?
Find the emergency supply kit in the crew quarters
Open it and check what's inside
Take the first aid kit and patch up my head wound
Try to open the door to the corridor
The door is jammed. Look for a manual override panel
Use the override to force the door open
Step into the corridor. What does it look like?
Head toward the life support control room in Section A
Check the oxygen readout on any wall panel I pass
The corridor is blocked by debris. Can I get through?
Look for an alternate route. Check the maintenance tunnels
Crawl through the maintenance tunnel toward Section A
I hear hissing. There's an air leak nearby. Locate it
Try to seal the leak with materials from my kit
Continue through the tunnel to Section A
Exit the tunnel. Where am I now?
Find the life support control panel and check the readings
How much oxygen do we have left? How much time?
Can I reroute oxygen from non-essential sections?
Do it. Reroute oxygen from Sections C and D to A and B
Check the communications array. Can I send a distress signal?
The comms are down. What do I need to fix them?
Where would I find a replacement relay board?
Head to the engineering bay to find the part
The engineering bay door needs power. Check the local power grid
Reroute power from the lights to the door mechanism
Open the engineering bay and search for the relay board
Found it. Also grab any other useful tools or parts
Check my inventory. What am I carrying?
Head back to the comms room. Take the fastest safe route
Install the relay board in the communications array
Power up the comms and send a distress signal
While waiting for a response, check on the other crew members
Go to the med bay and check the cryo pods
Are any crew members in the pods? What's their status?
Can I safely wake anyone up?
Wake up the crew member who seems healthiest
Brief them on the situation. What do they say?
Ask them what happened. What caused the damage?
Check the oxygen levels again. How are we doing?
The oxygen is dropping faster. Find the new leak
It's in Section B near the hull breach. Can we seal it?
We need to seal the bulkhead to Section B. Go do it
But my original crew quarters are in Section B. Grab anything important first
Seal the bulkhead. We lose Section B but save our oxygen
Check comms. Any response to our distress signal?
How long until rescue arrives? Do we have enough oxygen?
Settle in to wait. Take stock of our full situation and resources
